title: Fluffy Herbal Dutch Chestnut Mushroom Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful one-pot stew featuring chestnut mushrooms and herbal notes, perfect for a cold winter evening. This paleo-friendly dish is easy to prepare and packed with nutrients.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced chestnut mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the dried thyme and rosemary and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
